import { getGlobalStats, getAllUsersAdmin } from '@/lib/services/briefingService'; import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card'; import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'; import { Users, FileText, CalendarDays, CheckCircle2, ExternalLink, Shield } from 'lucide-react'; import Link from 'next/link'; import { format } from 'date-fns'; export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'; export default async function AdminDashboardPage() { const [stats, users] = await Promise.all([ getGlobalStats(), getAllUsersAdmin(), ]); return (
{/* Header */}

Admin Overview

Global platform metrics and user management.

{/* Global KPIs */}
Total Users

{stats.totalUsers}

 Total Briefings

{stats.totalSessions}

 Today

{stats.todaySessions}

 Completed

{stats.finishedSessions}
{/* Users Table */}

Registered Users

{users.length === 0 ? (

No users registered yet.

 ) : (
{users.filter(u => !u.is_admin).map(user => (
{/* Avatar + Name */}
{(user.display_name || 'U').charAt(0).toUpperCase()}

{user.display_name || 'Unnamed'}

{user.company_name || 'No company'}

{/* Stats */}
{user.sessionCount} Briefings
{user.finishedCount} Completed
{user.quota.used_briefings}/{user.quota.max_briefings} Quota
{/* Plan Badge + Actions */}
{user.plan || 'free'} {user.quota.is_blocked && ( Blocked )}
))}
)}
); }

source:
import { getSessions, getSessionStats, getUserProfile, getUserQuota } from '@/lib/services/briefingService'; import Link from 'next/link'; import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card'; import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'; import { CalendarDays, ExternalLink, Activity, Sparkles, CheckCircle2, Plus, FileText, TrendingUp, Clock, BarChart3, Trash2, Copy, Search, Filter, AlertCircle } from 'lucide-react'; import { format } from 'date-fns'; import { DashboardClient } from '@/components/dashboard/DashboardClient'; export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'; export default async function DashboardPage() { const [sessions, stats, profile, quota] = await Promise.all([ getSessions(), getSessionStats(), getUserProfile(), getUserQuota(), ]); const displayName = profile?.display_name || 'there'; const usedBriefings = quota?.used_briefings || 0; const maxBriefings = quota?.max_briefings || 10; const isBlocked = quota?.is_blocked || false; return (
{/* Header */}

Hello, {displayName}! 👋

Manage your intelligent briefings and track results.

{usedBriefings}/{maxBriefings} briefings
{/* Blocked Warning */} {isBlocked && (

Account paused

Your briefing quota has been reached. Contact support to upgrade.

)} {/* KPI Cards */}
Total Briefings

{stats.total}

 Completed

{stats.finished}

 In Progress

{stats.inProgress}

 Completion Rate

{stats.completionRate}%
{/* Quick Actions */}
{/* Sessions List — Client Component for filters/search */}
); }

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [activeMessage.questionType, colorWizardStep, fetchInitialColors, isFetchingColors, suggestedMainColors.length]
